title: Tantalizing Greek Eggplant Casserole
description: A funky, molten midnight craving Mediterranean dish that blends sweet chili and feta into a low‑sodium pressure‑cooked casserole.
instructions: Heat 2 tbsp olive oil in a pressure cooker using sauté mode.
Add diced onion and cook until translucent.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds.
Pour in tomato sauce, sweet chili sauce, lemon juice, oregano, pepper, and 1/4 tsp salt; stir to combine.
Add sliced eggplant and crumbled feta into the cooker; give a quick stir.
Seal pressure cooker lid, set to high pressure for 5 minutes, then quick‑release.
Transfer the contents to an oven‑safe baking dish, spreading evenly.
Sprinkle remaining feta and Parmesan on top.
Cover with foil and bake at 375°F for 20 minutes.
Remove foil, bake 5 minutes more until golden; let rest 5 minutes before serving.
